name: Rathin Pothani
title: Software Engineer
summary: Full-stack Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience. Skilled in Java, Spring Boot, React, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. Built scalable microservices, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native healthcare and fintech systems. Agile practitioner with a strong record of measurable impact.

Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, API Gateway)

bullets: Engineered 50+ T-SQL queries for performance tuning across databases with 1M+ records.
Built microservices and RESTful APIs with Spring Boot, improving scalability for large-scale healthcare apps.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Terraform, Docker, and Kubernetes, cutting deployment time by 40%.
Leveraged AWS (Lambda, EC2, API Gateway) for cloud-native deployments with high availability.
Integrated Spring Security for RBAC and JWT-based authentication, ensuring HIPAA compliance.

experience.company: University of Arkansas at Little Rock
bullets: Mentored 100+ master's students on Java, Spring Boot, AJAX, and RESTful APIs.
Conducted hands-on labs and code reviews, guiding students through full-stack web development.
Evaluated student projects, providing feedback on Spring Boot, Hibernate, and backend design.
Created assignments integrating Spring Boot, AJAX, and JSON for data-driven web apps.
Built internal audit automation with Java and Spring Boot, saving 80 hours/month of manual effort.
Automated 4 ETL pipelines cutting month-end reporting from 3 days to under 5 hours.
Delivered Angular dashboard used daily by 500+ consultants for project tracking.
Optimized 40+ SQL queries, reducing report generation from 2-3 minutes to under 15 seconds.
Built a React.js banking portal driving 30% increase in customer self-service logins in 6 months.
Developed 12 RESTful APIs with Node.js and MongoDB achieving sub-200ms response times.
Migrated 50,000+ customer records from legacy AS/400 systems to MongoDB, meeting GDPR audit requirements.
Increased payments module test coverage to 85% using Jest, catching bugs 3-4 days earlier in QA.
